resources.string: The circular library has no end; the walls bleed tomorrow.
CIRCULAR LIBRARY HAS NO END. WALLS BLEED TOMORROW.

The archive turns beyond the horizon. Prophecies crawl over asylum walls, each cipher shouting over the next. The seer has no eyes now, only channels: a thousand futures, a thousand deaths, a thousand might-have-beens. Blood seeps from the nose, ears, and gums. Truth is too heavy for the spine of reason, but one glimpse of the whole is worth the beautiful collapse.
ARCHIVE TURNS BEYOND SIGHT. PROPHECIES CRAWL. THE SEER HAS NO EYES. A THOUSAND FUTURES SHOUT. TRUTH CRUSHES REASON.
